description: Zocks is an AI meeting intelligence and workflow platform for financial advisors. It captures and structures client conversation data to help with notes, CRM updates, planning workflows, and client insights.
summary: Zocks exposes a remotely hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.zocks.io/v1/mcp` using streamable HTTP and user OAuth 2.0 via Zocks login; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found in public docs.
